div.p: What works in user namespace vs what requires host privilege or workarounds

g.text: Device nodes | PARTIAL | bind-mount from host

div.p: mount() syscall Full filesystem isolation pivot_root() works tmpfs, proc, bind mounts
Process isolation PID 1 inside container Zombie reaping /proc isolation
Hostname isolation sethostname() works uname() returns container domain name isolation
Some mounts fail overlay: limited support sysfs: not allowed devtmpfs: devices non-functional
mknod() succeeds But devices don't work Need bind-mount from host devtmpfs handles permissions
REQUIRES ROOT ip link add veth fails CAP_NET_ADMIN on host Bridge attach needs root
USERSPACE WORKAROUND TAP device in container TCP/IP in userspace No host privilege needed
REQUIRES ROOT mkdir /sys/fs/cgroup/ctr Permission denied No write access to cgroupfs
DELEGATION WORKAROUND Delegate=cpu memory pids User slice ownership systemctl --user set limits
